decision_log.rationale: Applied rules: not_null for all non-nullable columns without it (city, country, venue_type, created_at, is_active). accepted_values for low-cardinality columns (country=12, venue_type=8, is_active=2). Skipped: state (nullable, 8.5% nulls), capacity (nullable, 15.2% nulls), updated_at (nullable, 22% nulls). Existing tests on venue_id and venue_name preserved.
